_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Pan-neuronal knockdown of Nf1 elevated spontaneous grooming (Fig. 4b), as previously reported. In addition, we tested the more restricted PCB-Gal4 driver.
details: Successfully used for automated quantification of grooming behavior in open field assays
